title: Oh! It's my パーティー☆

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Heeelp! Help me, please!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, my Trainer! Help me! You gotta save me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: See, the thing is... I'm bein' chased right now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Really and truly! My pursuer's none other than the ever-so-scary Umamusume—no! The Umaboss—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ahaaa! There you are, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Umaboss, you're way too fast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Who're you calling Umaboss?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Help! Trainer, please help me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki hides behind me, cowering in fear.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So you're Taiki's trainer? Sorry, but I'm gonna have to ask you to turn
her over to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This little troublemaker tried to sneak out of the dorm after curfew.
As the Miho Dorm leader, I can't let that slide!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now, hand her over!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, no, nooo! Don't hand me over, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I step aside and usher Taiki forward.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What! How could ya, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! You found yourself a real sensible trainer, Taiki! I approve!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get a move on! Prepare yourself for an earful!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki's screams echo through the air as she is forcefully led away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few minutes later...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nope, I can't find either of them!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: This isn't good...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you there—excuse me! Have you seen Amazon or Taiki around
here?
choice_data_list: Taiki just got hauled off for a lecture.
Taiki just got hauled off for a lecture.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so we're too late! Talk about dropping the ball!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Amazon got the wrong idea about Taiki, and it's our faults...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Taiki did sneak out of the dorm after curfew... But it was all for our
sake.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: See, me and Grass's parents live overseas.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Since Taiki's in the same boat, she threw a party for us so we wouldn't
be lonely!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We were all having so much fun, but then the refreshments ran out
halfway through.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So Taiki said she was going to slip out and buy more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The image of Taiki assisting her ailing classmate after tryouts flashes
into my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though impulsive at times, she is nevertheless a friendly spirit who
takes notice of others and never hesitates to lend a helping hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promising to clear things up, I head off in the direction that Taiki had
been dragged away.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Cross my heart it won't happen again... Wait, huh?
choice_data_list: Hishi Amazon! I need to talk to you!
Hishi Amazon! I need to talk to you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What's all this about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I explain the situation to Hishi Amazon as it had been relayed to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, so that's what happened. No wonder you wouldn't tell me the
reason. Didn't want the others to take the blame, huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: W-well...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, you did mention something about a party a few times
during your babbling, so I figured there was more to the story.
choice_data_list: Think you could go easy on her?
Think you could go easy on her?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No can do. 'Fraid I'm not that soft. She needs to be properly
punished!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's a box full of candy and snacks on a shelf in the dorm kitchen.
Just so you know, it's reeeally heavy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Carry it to my room, and then bring El and Grass there too—pronto!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, you don't mean...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We're going to continue that pick-me-up party of yours! Hearing your
story actually made me a little nostalgic for home myself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's get together with our fellow Americans and make this a night to
remember!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Oh, Amazon! Thank yooou!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... And thank you too, Trainer! I'm so, so happy that ya came to my rescue!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't ya come party with us? It's sure to be real barn
burner!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Uh, trainers aren't even allowed to set foot in the dorm. So that's not
happening.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Say it ain't so, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All alone, I make my way back home.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! Traineeeeer!
